title: Session of Bible PCA v. Central Carolina [ M26GA (1998): 148]. Not sustained 11-7. D-Op 1, D-Op 4 — Summary: Alleged Pby erred by ruling an inactive RE could not serve on Pby committee without his Session's approval. Presbytery was aware the Session had a policy prohibiting such.
